preserved_current_contracts: physical identity-mode equalizer on a fixed physical charged fiber
common-shift covariance of the charged affine scalar

exact_remaining_theorem.equivalent_fiber_form: On one physical charged fiber, this is equivalent to determinant-cocycle vanishing Delta_M(r,r') = 0 together with one basepoint normalization S_M(r_0) = 3 mu(r_0).
exact_remaining_theorem.statement: Attach the fixed determinant exponent vector M^ch sector-isolatedly to the charged L-H-E determinant channel and prove 3 mu(r) = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r) on that channel. Equivalently, force the determinant normalization defect N_det to vanish.

proof_skeleton: The live same-label q_e readback fixes S_M = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e on the realized support.
The post-promotion equalizer constrains only pairwise differences mu(r') - mu(r) on one physical fiber.
For any constant kappa, the shifted scalar mu^kappa = mu + kappa preserves those pairwise differences.
The induced shifts s_det -> s_det + 3 kappa and A_ch -> A_ch + kappa preserve the required affine covariance.
The source-side q_e readback and therefore S_M are unchanged under this shift.
Hence the defect Theta = 3 mu - S_M is not fixed by current theorem-grade data.
no_go_theorem.statement: The populated same-label readback fixes the source-side determinant character S_M = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e, and the post-promotion identity-mode equalizer fixes the fiberwise differences of mu. But the charged corpus does not force the cross-normalization 3 mu(r) = S_M(r), because the additive affine shift mu -> mu + kappa preserves the existing cocycle/equalizer contracts while leaving S_M fixed. Therefore one additive determinant normalization constant stays unresolved.

notes: This theorem states a relative underdetermination result for the charged determinant normalization.
It isolates the missing scalar normalization theorem.
The live same-label q_e readback is fully populated and theorem-relevant on the source side.

post_promotion_trace_lift_scaffold.equalizer_contract: mu(r') - mu(r) = 0 on a fixed physical charged fiber

unresolved_scalar_defect.meaning: The current corpus fixes the source-side determinant character and the post-promotion identity-mode scalar only up to their relative additive origin.
unresolved_scalar_defect.physical_formula: N_det(P) = s_det(P) - sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(P)
unresolved_scalar_defect.trace_lift_formula: Theta(r) = 3 * mu(r) - sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r)
